text: Everything is falling apart; the economy is doomed and no one in power cares.
notes: Rhetorical overstatement; may exceed indicator-based stress.

text: Yes, things are rough, but local groups are organizing food co-ops and mutual aid. We are not helpless.
notes: Contrasting agency response in same thread; good for dD comparisons.

text: The blackout last night was annoying, but it also got my neighbors talking for the first time in years.
notes: Mild G stress; positive S effects; useful for nuance.
